raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is reachable and there is free table space to push it to the right, away from the seam between box_1 and box_2, without colliding with either box.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is shifted to the right side of box_2, clearing the front/near workspace around box_1 for safe arm approach."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_2 is reachable from its right side and there is free table space to the right to slide it; pushing will not cause box_2 to snag on box_1 despite their attachment, and the cup is already out of the way.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is displaced to the right, creating a gap and improving access to the right face of the darker box (box_1) for a two-arm lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both left and right sides of box_1 are now accessible with sufficient clearance for the two end-effectors to clamp the box from opposite sides, and the box is stable on the table.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held and lifted off the tabletop under dual-arm control (picked up)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is reachable and there is free table space to push it to the right, away from the seam between box_1 and box_2, without colliding with either box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is shifted to the right side of box_2, clearing the front/near workspace around box_1 for safe arm approach.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_2 is reachable from its right side and there is free table space to the right to slide it; pushing will not cause box_2 to snag on box_1 despite their attachment, and the cup is already out of the way.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is displaced to the right, creating a gap and improving access to the right face of the darker box (box_1) for a two-arm lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both left and right sides of box_1 are now accessible with sufficient clearance for the two end-effectors to clamp the box from opposite sides, and the box is stable on the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held and lifted off the tabletop under dual-arm control (picked up).
